long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between cbs01.eq01.mad01 et-6/0/20 <-> dar01.mad04 et-4/2/3. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19885
